---
title: "R Notebook"
output: none

Author: Galen O'Shea-Stone
Date: 9/30/25
Title: HOX_GDF11_focus
---


```{r}
# posthoc_HOX_GDF11_analysis.R
# HOX (A–D) + GDF11 post-hoc analysis
# - Robust heatmaps (PDF with PNG fallback)
# - Per-cluster heatmaps (HOXA–D)
# - Schematic grids (A–D x PG1–13) with HOXA on top
# - Category-specific schematic grids (anterior / thoracic / posterior_sacral)
# - NEW: sample–sample correlation heatmap (HOX+GDF11)
# - NEW: PCA on HOX+GDF11
# - NEW: A→P profiles by paralog group (per condition; faceted by cluster)
# - NEW: GDF11 vs posterior HOX (PG9–13) scatter per sample

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(pheatmap)
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
  library(tools)
  library(grid)
})

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Config & folders
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
in_dir <- "deseq2_outputs"

date_tag <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
run_tag  <- paste0("HOX_GDF11_run_", date_tag, "_", sprintf("%04d", sample(1:9999, 1)))
out_dir  <- file.path(in_dir, run_tag)
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
cat("Saving HOX/GDF11 outputs to:", normalizePath(out_dir), "\n")

target_symbols <- c("GDF11")
hox_regex_full <- "^(HOX)([ABCD])([0-9]+)$"
hox_regex      <- "^HOX[ABCD][0-9]+"
cluster_order  <- c("A","B","C","D","Other")
groups_1_13    <- 1:13

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load prior outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
norm_counts_file <- file.path(in_dir, "normalized_counts.csv")
coldata_file     <- file.path(in_dir, "coldata_used.csv")
annot_file       <- file.path(in_dir, "gene_annotation_used.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(norm_counts_file), file.exists(coldata_file), file.exists(annot_file))

norm_counts <- data.frame(fread(norm_counts_file), check.names = FALSE)
coldata     <- data.frame(fread(coldata_file), row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
gene_annot  <- data.frame(fread(annot_file),  check.names = FALSE)

stopifnot("Geneid" %in% colnames(gene_annot))
rownames(gene_annot) <- gene_annot$Geneid

idcol_nc <- if ("Geneid" %in% colnames(norm_counts)) "Geneid" else
            if ("V1" %in% colnames(norm_counts)) "V1" else
            colnames(norm_counts)[1]
rownames(norm_counts) <- norm_counts[[idcol_nc]]
norm_counts[[idcol_nc]] <- NULL

common_samples <- intersect(colnames(norm_counts), rownames(coldata))
if (!length(common_samples)) stop("No overlapping sample IDs between normalized_counts and coldata_used.")
norm_counts <- norm_counts[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
coldata     <- coldata[common_samples, , drop = FALSE]

for (cn in c("SYMBOL","Ensembl_GeneID","NCBI_GeneID"))
  if (!(cn %in% colnames(gene_annot))) gene_annot[[cn]] <- NA_character_

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Detect HOX + GDF11 and mapping
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
detect_cluster <- function(sym) {
  res <- data.frame(cluster = "Other", num = NA_integer_, is_hox = FALSE)
  if (is.na(sym) || !nzchar(sym)) return(res)
  m <- regexec(hox_regex_full, toupper(sym)); pr <- regmatches(sym, m)[[1]]
  if (length(pr) == 4) return(data.frame(cluster = pr[3], num = as.integer(pr[4]), is_hox = TRUE))
  m2 <- regexec("^(HOX)([ABCD])([0-9]+)", toupper(sym)); pr2 <- regmatches(sym, m2)[[1]]
  if (length(pr2) >= 4) return(data.frame(cluster = pr2[3], num = as.integer(pr2[4]), is_hox = TRUE))
  res
}

anno_df <- data.frame(
  Geneid   = rownames(gene_annot),
  SYMBOL   = gene_annot$SYMBOL %||% NA_character_,
  Ensembl  = gene_annot$Ensembl_GeneID %||% NA_character_,
  Entrez   = gene_annot$NCBI_GeneID %||% NA_character_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
det <- do.call(rbind, lapply(anno_df$SYMBOL, detect_cluster))
anno_df$HOX_cluster <- det$cluster
anno_df$HOX_num     <- det$num
anno_df$is_HOX      <- det$is_hox

is_gdf    <- !is.na(anno_df$SYMBOL) & toupper(anno_df$SYMBOL) %in% toupper(target_symbols)
is_hox_fb <- (!anno_df$is_HOX) & grepl(hox_regex, anno_df$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)
is_gdf_fb <- (!is_gdf)         & grepl("^GDF11$",  anno_df$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)

keep_ids  <- anno_df$Geneid[ anno_df$is_HOX | is_gdf | is_hox_fb | is_gdf_fb ]
nc_sub    <- norm_counts[intersect(keep_ids, rownames(norm_counts)), , drop = FALSE]
anno_sub  <- anno_df[match(rownames(nc_sub), anno_df$Geneid), , drop = FALSE]

disp_symbol <- anno_sub$SYMBOL
disp_symbol[is.na(disp_symbol) | !nzchar(disp_symbol)] <- rownames(anno_sub)
names(disp_symbol) <- rownames(anno_sub)

ord <- order(
  factor(anno_sub$HOX_cluster, levels = cluster_order),
  ifelse(is.na(anno_sub$HOX_num), 99L, anno_sub$HOX_num),
  toupper(disp_symbol)
)
nc_sub      <- nc_sub[ord, , drop = FALSE]
anno_sub    <- anno_sub[ord, , drop = FALSE]
disp_symbol <- disp_symbol[ord]

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Export mapping & long expression
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
map_df <- data.frame(
  Geneid         = rownames(anno_sub),
  SYMBOL_display = unname(disp_symbol),
  SYMBOL_raw     = anno_sub$SYMBOL,
  HOX_cluster    = anno_sub$HOX_cluster,
  HOX_num        = anno_sub$HOX_num,
  Ensembl_GeneID = gene_annot[rownames(anno_sub), "Ensembl_GeneID"],
  NCBI_GeneID    = gene_annot[rownames(anno_sub), "NCBI_GeneID"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
fwrite(map_df, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_gene_map.csv"))

expr_long <- as.data.frame(nc_sub, check.names = FALSE)
expr_long$SYMBOL_display <- disp_symbol
expr_long$HOX_cluster    <- anno_sub$HOX_cluster
expr_long$HOX_num        <- anno_sub$HOX_num
expr_long$Geneid         <- rownames(expr_long)
expr_long <- data.table::melt(
  data.table::as.data.table(expr_long),
  id.vars = c("Geneid","SYMBOL_display","HOX_cluster","HOX_num"),
  variable.name = "sample", value.name = "norm_count"
)
expr_long$log2_norm <- log2(as.numeric(expr_long$norm_count) + 1)
expr_long$condition <- coldata[expr_long$sample, "condition"]
fwrite(expr_long, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_expression_long.csv"))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Robust z-scoring + safe file writer (PDF→PNG fallback)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
prep_z <- function(mat) {
  orig_ids <- rownames(mat)
  M <- as.matrix(mat)
  storage.mode(M) <- "double"
  M[!is.finite(M)] <- NA_real_
  M <- log2(M + 1)

  keep <- apply(M, 1, function(x) {
    xf <- x[is.finite(x)]
    if (length(xf) <= 1) return(FALSE)
    var(xf) > 0
  })

  if (!any(keep, na.rm = TRUE))
    return(list(mat = NULL, kept_ids = character(0), dropped = orig_ids))

  M <- M[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  Z <- t(scale(t(M)))
  Z[!is.finite(Z)] <- 0
  Z[Z >  3] <-  3
  Z[Z < -3] <- -3
  rownames(Z) <- rownames(M)
  list(mat = Z, kept_ids = rownames(Z), dropped = setdiff(orig_ids, rownames(Z)))
}

safe_heatmap <- function(mat, pdf_file, png_file, width = 8, height = 6, ...) {
  if (is.null(mat) || !nrow(mat) || !ncol(mat)) {
    warning("Heatmap skipped for ", basename(pdf_file), " (empty)."); return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  ok <- TRUE
  try({
    pheatmap(mat, filename = pdf_file, width = width, height = height, ...)
    sz <- suppressWarnings(file.info(pdf_file)$size)
    if (is.na(sz) || sz == 0) ok <- FALSE
  }, silent = TRUE)
  if (!ok) {
    warning("PDF write failed or empty for ", basename(pdf_file), "; writing PNG fallback.")
    try({
      pheatmap(mat, filename = png_file, width = width, height = height, ...)
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
}

save_plot_both <- function(plot, file_stem, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300) {
  ggsave(paste0(file_stem, ".pdf"), plot, width = width, height = height)
  ggsave(paste0(file_stem, ".png"), plot, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi)
}

ann_col <- data.frame(condition = coldata$condition)
rownames(ann_col) <- rownames(coldata)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Combined heatmap with cluster gaps
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  rows_df <- data.frame(
    gene_id = rownames(nc_sub),
    label   = unname(disp_symbol),
    cluster = anno_sub$HOX_cluster,
    num     = anno_sub$HOX_num,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  prep <- prep_z(nc_sub)
  mat_z <- prep$mat

  if (!is.null(mat_z)) {
    kept_ids <- prep$kept_ids
    lbls <- rows_df$label[match(kept_ids, rows_df$gene_id)]
    clks <- rows_df$cluster[match(kept_ids, rows_df$gene_id)]
    rownames(mat_z) <- lbls
    gap_idx <- which(head(clks, -1) != tail(clks, -1))

    safe_heatmap(
      mat_z,
      pdf_file = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_heatmap_ALL_clusters.pdf"),
      png_file = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_heatmap_ALL_clusters.png"),
      width = 8.5, height = 7,
      annotation_col = ann_col,
      cluster_rows   = FALSE,
      cluster_cols   = TRUE,
      gaps_row       = gap_idx,
      show_rownames  = TRUE,
      fontsize_row   = 7,
      main = "HOX (A–D) + GDF11 — log2(norm+1) z-scored; rows ordered by cluster & number"
    )
  } else {
    warning("All rows had zero variance for combined heatmap; skipped.")
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-cluster heatmaps (HOXA–D)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for (cl in c("A","B","C","D")) {
  idx <- which(anno_sub$HOX_cluster == cl & !is.na(anno_sub$HOX_num))
  if (!length(idx)) next
  idx <- idx[order(anno_sub$HOX_num[idx], na.last = TRUE)]
  mat <- nc_sub[idx, , drop = FALSE]

  rows_df_cl <- data.frame(
    gene_id = rownames(mat),
    label   = unname(disp_symbol[rownames(mat)]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  prep <- prep_z(mat); if (is.null(prep$mat)) next
  mat_z <- prep$mat
  kept_ids <- prep$kept_ids
  rownames(mat_z) <- rows_df_cl$label[match(kept_ids, rows_df_cl$gene_id)]

  h <- max(3.5, nrow(mat_z) * 0.35 + 2)
  safe_heatmap(
    mat_z,
    pdf_file = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("HOX%s_heatmap.pdf", cl)),
    png_file = file.path(out_dir, sprintf("HOX%s_heatmap.png", cl)),
    width = 7.5, height = h,
    annotation_col = ann_col,
    cluster_rows   = FALSE,
    cluster_cols   = TRUE,
    show_rownames  = TRUE,
    fontsize_row   = 8,
    main = sprintf("HOX%s — log2(norm+1) z-scored (ordered 1→13)", cl)
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# HOX cluster grid (A–D × 1–13) — schematic-like tile plot (HOXA on TOP)
# and category-specific grids (anterior / thoracic / posterior_sacral)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
expr_means <- expr_long[, c("SYMBOL_display","HOX_cluster","HOX_num","sample","log2_norm")]
expr_means <- expr_means[!is.na(expr_means$HOX_cluster) & !is.na(expr_means$HOX_num), ]
gene_means <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ SYMBOL_display + HOX_cluster + HOX_num,
                        data = expr_means, FUN = mean)

grid_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(c("A","B","C","D"), function(cl) {
  data.frame(HOX_cluster = cl, HOX_num = groups_1_13)
}))
grid_df <- merge(grid_df, gene_means,
                 by = c("HOX_cluster","HOX_num"), all.x = TRUE, sort = TRUE)
grid_df$label <- paste0("HOX", grid_df$HOX_cluster, grid_df$HOX_num)

# Put HOXA at the TOP: ggplot draws first level at bottom, so reverse levels
y_levels <- c("D","C","B","A")          # bottom→top = D,C,B,A => shows A at the top
y_labels <- c("HOXD","HOXC","HOXB","HOXA")

# Unified color limits across all grids for comparability
vmin <- suppressWarnings(min(grid_df$log2_norm, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(vmin)) vmin <- 0
vmax <- suppressWarnings(max(grid_df$log2_norm, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(vmax)) vmax <- 1

# ---- Combined A–D × 1–13 grid
p_grid <- ggplot(
  grid_df,
  aes(x = HOX_num, y = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = y_levels), fill = log2_norm)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey30") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.na(log2_norm), "", paste0(substr(HOX_cluster,1,1), HOX_num))),
            size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = y_labels) +
  scale_fill_continuous(limits = c(vmin, vmax), name = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
  labs(title = "HOX clusters schematic — mean expression per homology group",
       x = "Homology group (1→13; 3'→5')", y = "") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

save_plot_both(p_grid, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_schematic_grid"), width = 10, height = 4.5)

# ---- Category-specific grids (edit bins as needed)
category_bins <- list(
  anterior         = 1:3,   # PG1–PG3
  thoracic         = 4:8,   # PG4–PG8
  posterior_sacral = 9:13   # PG9–PG13
)

for (cat_name in names(category_bins)) {
  rng <- category_bins[[cat_name]]
  sub_df <- grid_df[grid_df$HOX_num %in% rng, , drop = FALSE]

  p_sub <- ggplot(
    sub_df,
    aes(x = HOX_num, y = factor(HOX_cluster, levels = y_levels), fill = log2_norm)
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = "grey30") +
    geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.na(log2_norm), "", paste0(substr(HOX_cluster,1,1), HOX_num))),
              size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = rng) +
    scale_y_discrete(labels = y_labels) +
    scale_fill_continuous(limits = c(vmin, vmax), name = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
    labs(title = paste0("HOX schematic — ", gsub("_", " ", cat_name), " (PG", min(rng), "–", max(rng), ")"),
         x = "Homology group (3'→5')", y = "") +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

  w <- 3 + 0.55 * length(rng)
  save_plot_both(p_sub, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_schematic_grid_", cat_name)), width = w, height = 4.0)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-gene boxplots
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 0) {
  expr_long$SYMBOL_display <- factor(expr_long$SYMBOL_display, levels = disp_symbol)
  bp <- ggplot(expr_long, aes(x = condition, y = log2_norm)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    facet_wrap(~ SYMBOL_display, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
    labs(title = "HOX + GDF11 expression by condition",
         y = "log2(normalized counts + 1)", x = "") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
  save_plot_both(bp, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_boxplots_log2norm_by_condition"), width = 10,
                 height = max(4, ceiling(nrow(nc_sub)/4)*2.8))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DE contrast summaries + LFC lollipops
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
all_de <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^DESeq2_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
sym_to_geneid <- setNames(rownames(gene_annot), gene_annot$SYMBOL)
ens_to_geneid <- setNames(rownames(gene_annot), gene_annot$Ensembl_GeneID)

summary_list <- list()
for (f in all_de) {
  rn_dt <- fread(f); rn <- as.data.frame(rn_dt, check.names = FALSE)
  idcol <- if ("row.names" %in% colnames(rn)) "row.names" else
           if ("V1" %in% colnames(rn)) "V1" else colnames(rn)[1]
  rownames(rn) <- rn[[idcol]]; rn[[idcol]] <- NULL
  rn$Geneid <- rownames(rn)

  not_geneid <- !(rn$Geneid %in% rownames(gene_annot))
  if (any(not_geneid)) {
    hit_sym <- rn$Geneid[not_geneid] %in% names(sym_to_geneid)
    rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_sym] <- sym_to_geneid[rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_sym]]
  }
  not_geneid <- !(rn$Geneid %in% rownames(gene_annot))
  if (any(not_geneid)) {
    hit_ens <- rn$Geneid[not_geneid] %in% names(ens_to_geneid)
    rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_ens] <- ens_to_geneid[rn$Geneid[not_geneid & hit_ens]]
  }

  rn$SYMBOL_display <- gene_annot[rn$Geneid, "SYMBOL"]
  rn$SYMBOL_display[is.na(rn$SYMBOL_display) | !nzchar(rn$SYMBOL_display)] <- rn$Geneid

  keep_rows <- grepl(hox_regex, rn$SYMBOL_display) |
               toupper(rn$SYMBOL_display) %in% toupper(target_symbols) |
               grepl(hox_regex, rn$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE) |
               grepl("^GDF11$", rn$Geneid, ignore.case = TRUE)

  rn_sub <- rn[keep_rows, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(rn_sub) > 0) {
    contrast_label <- sub("^DESeq2_", "", sub("\\.csv$", "", basename(f)))
    rn_sub$contrast <- contrast_label
    fwrite(rn_sub, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_GDF11_", contrast_label, ".csv")))

    lfc_col <- if ("log2FC_shrunken" %in% colnames(rn_sub)) "log2FC_shrunken" else
               if ("log2FC" %in% colnames(rn_sub)) "log2FC" else NA
    if (!is.na(lfc_col)) {
      lp <- ggplot(rn_sub, aes(x = .data[[lfc_col]], y = SYMBOL_display)) +
        geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = .data[[lfc_col]],
                         y = SYMBOL_display, yend = SYMBOL_display)) +
        geom_point(size = 2) +
        labs(title = paste0("HOX + GDF11 LFC — ", contrast_label),
             x = if (lfc_col == "log2FC_shrunken") "log2FC (shrunken)" else "log2FC (Wald)",
             y = "") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
        theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
      save_plot_both(lp, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX_GDF11_LFC_", contrast_label)), width = 7,
                     height = max(3.5, nrow(rn_sub) * 0.3 + 1.5))
    }
    summary_list[[length(summary_list) + 1]] <- rn_sub
  }
}

if (length(summary_list)) {
  all_summary <- data.table::rbindlist(summary_list, fill = TRUE)
  fwrite(all_summary, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_all_contrasts_tidy.csv"))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NEW: Sample–sample correlation heatmap (HOX+GDF11 genes)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 1) {
  mat_log2 <- log2(nc_sub + 1)
  # drop rows with zero variance across samples
  keep <- apply(mat_log2, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
  mat_log2 <- as.matrix(mat_log2[keep, , drop = FALSE])
  if (nrow(mat_log2) > 1) {
    cor_mat <- cor(mat_log2, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")
    safe_heatmap(
      cor_mat,
      pdf_file = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_sample_correlation.pdf"),
      png_file = file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_sample_correlation.png"),
      width = 7.5, height = 6.5,
      annotation_col = ann_col, annotation_row = ann_col,
      cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
      main = "Sample–sample correlation (HOX+GDF11)"
    )
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NEW: PCA on HOX+GDF11 (scores plot)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
if (nrow(nc_sub) > 1) {
  X <- log2(nc_sub + 1)
  # center+scale genes to equalize variance
  X <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(X)), center = TRUE, scale = TRUE))
  X[!is.finite(X)] <- 0
  # prcomp expects samples in rows
  pca <- tryCatch(prcomp(t(X), center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(pca) && ncol(pca$x) >= 2) {
    pca_df <- data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
    pca_df$sample    <- rownames(pca_df)
    pca_df$condition <- coldata[rownames(pca_df), "condition"]
    var_exp <- pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)
    pc1lab <- sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[1])
    pc2lab <- sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", 100 * var_exp[2])

    pp <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition, label = sample)) +
      geom_point(size = 2.6) +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 50, box.padding = 0.3, segment.size = 0.2) +
      labs(title = "PCA on HOX+GDF11", x = pc1lab, y = pc2lab) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    # if ggrepel missing, fallback without labels
    if (!requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
      pp <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition)) +
        geom_point(size = 2.6) +
        labs(title = "PCA on HOX+GDF11", x = pc1lab, y = pc2lab) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
        theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    }
    save_plot_both(pp, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_GDF11_PCA"), width = 7.5, height = 6.2)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NEW: Anterior→posterior expression profiles by condition (per cluster)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Average log2(norm+1) per (condition, cluster, PG)
ap_df <- expr_long[!is.na(expr_long$HOX_num) & expr_long$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D"), ]
if (nrow(ap_df)) {
  ap_cond <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ condition + HOX_cluster + HOX_num, data = ap_df, FUN = mean)
  ap_cond$HOX_cluster <- factor(ap_cond$HOX_cluster, levels = c("A","B","C","D"))
  # combined facet (A–D)
  ap_plot <- ggplot(ap_cond, aes(x = HOX_num, y = log2_norm, color = condition, group = condition)) +
    geom_line(size = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.7) +
    facet_wrap(~ HOX_cluster, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y",
               labeller = as_labeller(c(A="HOXA",B="HOXB",C="HOXC",D="HOXD"))) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
    labs(title = "Anterior→posterior HOX profiles by condition",
         x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13)", y = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0))
  save_plot_both(ap_plot, file.path(out_dir, "HOX_AP_profiles_by_condition"), width = 12, height = 3.8)

  # per-cluster standalone (optional, quick loop)
  for (cl in c("A","B","C","D")) {
    sub <- ap_cond[ap_cond$HOX_cluster == cl, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!nrow(sub)) next
    pp <- ggplot(sub, aes(HOX_num, log2_norm, color = condition, group = condition)) +
      geom_line(size = 1) + geom_point(size = 1.7) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = groups_1_13) +
      labs(title = paste0("HOX", cl, " anterior→posterior profile by condition"),
           x = "Paralog group (PG1→PG13)", y = "mean log2(norm+1)") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) + theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    save_plot_both(pp, file.path(out_dir, paste0("HOX", cl, "_AP_profile_by_condition")), width = 7.5, height = 4.2)
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NEW: GDF11 vs posterior HOX (PG9–13) per-sample association
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
has_gdf11 <- any(toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11")
if (has_gdf11) {
  # per-sample GDF11 expression (log2 norm+1)
  gdf_df <- expr_long[toupper(expr_long$SYMBOL_display) == "GDF11", c("sample","log2_norm","condition")]
  names(gdf_df)[2] <- "gdf11"

  # posterior HOX = mean across HOX clusters PG9–13 (per sample)
  post_df <- expr_long[expr_long$HOX_cluster %in% c("A","B","C","D") & expr_long$HOX_num %in% 9:13, ]
  if (nrow(post_df)) {
    post_mean <- aggregate(log2_norm ~ sample, data = post_df, FUN = mean)
    names(post_mean)[2] <- "posterior_hox"
    m <- merge(gdf_df, post_mean, by = "sample", all = FALSE)
    if (nrow(m) >= 3) {
      # Pearson r
      r <- suppressWarnings(cor(m$gdf11, m$posterior_hox, use = "complete.obs"))
      subttl <- if (is.finite(r)) sprintf("Pearson r = %.2f", r) else NULL

      sp <- ggplot(m, aes(x = gdf11, y = posterior_hox, color = condition, label = sample)) +
        geom_point(size = 2.4) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
        labs(title = "GDF11 vs posterior HOX (PG9–13) per sample",
             subtitle = subttl,
             x = "GDF11 log2(norm+1)", y = "Posterior HOX (PG9–13) mean log2(norm+1)") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
        theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
      save_plot_both(sp, file.path(out_dir, "GDF11_vs_posteriorHOX_scatter"), width = 7.2, height = 5.8)
    }
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Done
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== HOX/GDF11 posthoc outputs ===\n")
cat("Input dir: ", normalizePath(in_dir), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Output dir:", normalizePath(out_dir), "\n")


```
